reason: Expand the June 30 scoring baseline from three routes to six routes so calibration covers fresh comparisons, affiliate buyer guides, and current news in addition to the existing tool, internal-link-gap comparison, and stale static answer cases.
expected_effect: Gold-set calibration should pass with 6 cases, 0 mismatches, page-type profile coverage for tool, comparison, affiliate buyer, news, and default static pages, and unchanged pass status for threshold review.
